strengths: 15+ years polyglot engineering across web, backend, embedded, and distributed systems
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Fintech-adjacent experience at RIDE Capital with TDD and trunk-based discipline
concerns: No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems at scale
No evidence of scaling engineering orgs from 10 to 30+ or executive leadership
Lacks senior technical leadership tenure required for CTO seniority

key_factors.factor: Executive leadership and org scaling experience
Production multi-agent AI systems track record

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior individual contributor with broad polyglot engineering experience, some fintech adjacency, and early exposure to agentic AI tooling via MCP work. However, the role demands an executive with a proven record building production multi-agent systems and scaling engineering organizations beyond 30 people, neither of which is evidenced in the resume. The profile fits a staff/principal engineering track more than a CTO seat at a venture-backed scale-up.
